package rulefixtures

import (
	texttemplate "text/template"
)

// scenario for text_template_for_html: `text/template` used to generate HTML content (check for HTML tags in template literals or `.html` file extensions in `ParseFiles`)
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario740Positive(name string) (*texttemplate.Template, error) {
	return texttemplate.New("page").Parse("<html><body>{.}</body></html>")
}
